goals: Understand how to calculate future value of an investment for a history paper on savings growth over time
Compare different interest rates to see how historical savings would have grown
Calculate present value of a historical amount to understand purchasing power in today's terms
Use the interactive web interface to visualize and compare financial scenarios

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn, but not financially sophisticated. Asks questions to understand concepts rather than assuming knowledge.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic math skills but limited financial knowledge. Does not know financial formulas or tool names. Needs explanations to connect calculations to their history paper topic about economic history.

end_condition: The student has completed their calculations for the history paper and understands how to use the financial calculator to compare different scenarios for their research on historical economic trends.
